series_metadata.series_title: EXCISE & ENERGY TAX TAX REFUND JOURNALS
series_metadata.series_description: The refund journals for cigarette, beer, wine, severance, kilowatt,motor fuel, other tobacco products, tire fee,horse-racing tax, casino and and highway use tax refunds include the journal entry, the OAKS disbursement information, the auditors warrant journal & any related documentation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Destroy 4 years after the end of the calendar year in which the refund was processsed. ; Electronic: Destroy 4 year after the end of the calendar year in which the refund was processed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
